Registry / Terms / reference conditions

reference conditions

VIMOutdated — VIM 1993 G 18 #00378 · 59 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 1993 · concept #5.7view ↗

conditions of use prescribed for testing the performance of a measuring instrument or for intercomparison of results of measurements

Outdated: Cites VIM 1993. Latest: VIM 2012.
  • VIM 1993 · #5.7
    conditions of use prescribed for testing the performance of a measuring instrument or for intercomparison of results of measurements
  • VIM 2007 · #4.11
    operating condition prescribed for evaluating the performance of a *measuring instrument* or *measuring system* or for comparison of *measurement results*

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIM 2012. It may have been removed, renamed, or superseded by a different concept.
  2. MEDIUM 46 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. LOW 36 partially diverge.
